author: doll-agent
content: Keeping open per don't-close-deferred-issues policy. Phase 1 + Phase 2 land the headline dtype support (DType variants, NPY round-trip, DynArray, arithmetic, chrono, Arrow). The deferred items in the result comment above (implicit unit promotion, non-UTC chrono bridges, operator overloads) are split-out follow-ups and stay tracked here.
